  • Uses of ConstantExpression in org.episteme.core.mathematics.symbolic

    Methods in org.episteme.core.mathematics.symbolic that return ConstantExpression
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends Ring<E>>
    ConstantExpression<E>
    ConstantExpression.ofConstant(E value, Ring<E> ring)
    Returns a constant expression for the given value and ring.
    static ConstantExpression<Real>
    ConstantExpression.valueOf(double value)
    Returns a constant expression for the given double value using Real numbers.
